tasks.label: 安装依赖 (backend)
tasks.command: rm -rf .venv && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -U pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt

tasks.label: 启动后端并等待就绪 (8000)
tasks.command: pkill -f "uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; nohup .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 > uvicorn_8000.log 2>&1 & for i in $(seq 1 30); do .venv/bin/python -c "import socket,sys; s=socket.socket(); s.settimeout(0.5); r=s.connect_ex(('127.0.0.1',8000)); s.close(); sys.exit(0 if r==0 else 1)" && (echo backend ready; exit 0); sleep 1; done; echo backend not ready; exit 1
